title: carpesium scandens
intro: Carpesium scandens, also known as Chinese safflower or climbing safflower, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the sunflower family. Traditionally, Carpesium scandens has been used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been shown to aid in wound healing and reduce inflammation. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. In herbal preparations, Carpesium scandens is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as being dried and used as a medicinal herb or added to salves and creams for topical application.
